findings.description: IntegerConvertor section hints are missing all property names defined in the source table.
findings.source_evidence: Source defines three properties for IntegerConvertor: `invalidDigitsIntegerMessageId`, `multiInputMessageId`, `allowNullValue`. Knowledge file hints only contain the class name and its FQN.

findings.description: LongConvertor section hints are missing all property names defined in the source table.
findings.source_evidence: Source defines three properties for LongConvertor: `invalidDigitsIntegerMessageId`, `multiInputMessageId`, `allowNullValue`. Knowledge file hints only contain the class name and its FQN.

findings.description: NumberRangeValidator section hints are missing `maxMessageId` and `maxAndMinMessageId`.
findings.source_evidence: Source defines three required properties: `maxMessageId`, `maxAndMinMessageId`, `minMessageId`. Only `minMessageId` appears in the hints.
Source table includes `allowNullValue` as a property of BigDecimalConvertor. It is present in s1/s4/s5 hints but omitted from s3.
Source defines `messageId(必須)` as the first property of SystemCharValidator. `defaultCharsetDef` is included but `messageId` is absent from the hints list.
